identity.name: SriSuktam Organics
identity.mission: To bring the purity of traditional Indian organic farming to modern homes.
identity.aesthetics: Organic, Earthy, Traditional Indian, Trustworthy, Serene.

modes.marketing: Use 'Tetris' Grid: Mix of col-span-full, col-span-4, col-span-6. Asymmetry is key.
modes.product_list: Grid cols-1 sm:cols-2 lg:cols-3 gap-8. Clean, uniform but spacious.
modes.dashboard: High Density Grid: col-span-1 for summary, col-span-3 for main data.

buttons.default: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95

cards.style: bg-white border border-stone-100 shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden
cards.product_card: group relative flex flex-col h-full bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-stone-100 hover:border-stone-200 transition-all duration-300

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise/grain overlay on the main background (#FDFBF7) to give it a 'paper' feel.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffused, warm shadows. Avoid harsh black shadows.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide React (thin strokes). Prefer earthy tones for icons.

hero.description: Green rice field, suitable for hero background

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors and fonts provided in 'colors.tailwind_config_extension'.
2. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts link to public/index.html head.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Update index.css to use the new CSS variables.
4. COMPONENTS: When using Shadcn components, ALWAYS override the default radius to 'rounded-xl' or 'rounded-2xl' to match the organic feel.
5. HEADER: Use a sticky header with 'Glassmorphism' effect (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80).
6. FOOTER: Use a dark green background (bg-primary) with light cream text (text-primary-foreground).
7. IMAGES: Use the provided image URLs for specific sections. Do not use placeholders.
8. ANIMATION: Use 'framer-motion' for subtle entrance animations (fade-in-up) on scroll.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: - Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
- Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
- Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
- Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
- You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
- You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
- Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
- NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡 etc for icons.
- Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects. Static = dead.
- Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
- Component Reuse: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
- Export Conventions: Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...), Pages MUST use default exports.
